summary: 对于 $d-$ 维非线性马里兰模型 \begin{equation}\label{eq-abs} \ri\partial_t q_n=\tan\pi(n\cdot\varpi+x)q_n+\epsilon(\Delta q)_n+|q_n|^2q_n,\quad n\in{\Z^d}, \end{equation} 与 $d\in\N^*$, $\epsilon\in \R$ 和 $\varpi\in\R^d$ 满足适当的丢番图条件，我们建立多项式加权 $\ell^2$-范数 $$\|q(t)\|_s:=\left(\sum_{n\in{\Z^d}}|q_n|^2 (1+|n|^2)^{s}\right)^{\frac{1}{2}},\quad 的多项式长期稳定性s>0。 $$ 更准确地说，给定任何 $M_*\in\N^*$，对于属于 $\R/\Z$ 的几乎全测量子集的相位参数 $x$，如果 $|\epsilon|$ 足够小，则方程的解 $q(t)$ (\ref{eq-abs}) 具有足够小尺寸 $\varepsilon$ 的高阶加权 $\ell^2$-范数 $\|q(0)\|_s$ 满足 $$\|q(t)\|_s=\CO(\varepsilon),\quad \forall \ |t|\leq \epsilon^{-1}\varepsilon^{-M_*}。 $$ 证明依赖于 Birkhoff 范式过程。

title: Nonlocal thermal Willis coupling in laminated conductors
abstract: Building on Willis' homogenization framework, recent work has revealed that heterogeneous conductors exhibit macroscopic thermal bianisotropy, in which the macroscopic heat flux and entropy are nonlocally coupled to both temperature and temperature gradient. Existing numerical examples, however, are limited to the subwavelength regime. Here, we provide the first explicit demonstration of this spatial nonlocality by computing the effective kernels of a periodic laminate using three independent homogenization methods. The three approaches yield consistent nonlocal cross-coupling terms, clarifying the roles of spatial asymmetry and averaging choice. We also calculate the corresponding thermal impedance and show that it is direction-dependent, highlighting a physical signature of thermal bianisotropy relevant to thermal metamaterials.
summary: 基于威利斯的均质化框架，最近的工作表明，异质导体表现出宏观热双各向异性，其中宏观热通量和熵与温度和温度梯度非局部耦合。然而，现有的数值示例仅限于亚波长范围。在这里，我们通过使用三种独立的均质化方法计算周期性层合板的有效内核，首次明确证明了这种空间非定域性。这三种方法产生一致的非局部交叉耦合项，阐明了空间不对称和平均选择的作用。我们还计算了相应的热阻抗，并表明它是方向相关的，突出了与热超材料相关的热双各向异性的物理特征。

title: Resolving the viscosity operator ambiguity on Riemannian manifolds via a kinematic selection principle
abstract: On a general Riemannian manifold the Navier-Stokes equations admit several inequivalent formulations, differing in the choice of viscous operator: the Hodge Laplacian, the Bochner Laplacian, or the deformation Laplacian. We show that a Lagrangian kinematic construction, in which the strain rate is built from the rate of change of inner products of Lie-dragged connecting vectors, uniquely selects the deformation Laplacian for fluids whose configuration space is intrinsically the manifold. The Hodge Laplacian is excluded at the kinematic step (before introducing constitutive assumptions) because the strain rate constructed from inner-product geometry is symmetric and has no antisymmetric part. We further show that when the fluid arises as a thin-shell limit of an ambient three-dimensional flow, the operator that emerges depends on the boundary condition imposed in the normal direction: stress-free (Navier slip) conditions recover the deformation Laplacian, while Hodge boundary conditions recover the Hodge Laplacian, via an explicit decomposition of the ambient Bochner Laplacian into intrinsic and extrinsic pieces. The intrinsic piece is the deformation Laplacian regardless of the boundary condition. As an analytical confirmation, we show that the kinematic selection is consistent with the known failure of the energy inequality for the Hodge Laplacian on the hyperbolic plane $\HH^2$: the deformation Laplacian is coercive on $\HH^2$ while the Hodge Laplacian is not, because the Ricci term has the opposite sign in the two operators. We further prove that on any complete two-dimensional manifold with Gaussian curvature bounded above by a negative constant, the incompressible Navier-Stokes equation with the deformation Laplacian admits a unique global weak solution with exponential energy decay, resolving the analytical obstruction preventing the corresponding result for the Hodge Laplacian.
summary:
在一般黎曼流形上，纳维-斯托克斯方程允许几个不等价的公式，它们在粘性算子的选择上有所不同：霍奇拉普拉斯算子、博赫纳拉普拉斯算子或变形拉普拉斯算子。我们证明了拉格朗日运动学结构，其中应变率是根据李拖连接向量的内积变化率构建的，它唯一地选择构型空间本质上是流形的流体的变形拉普拉斯算子。霍奇拉普拉斯算子在运动学步骤中被排除（在引入本构假设之前），因为从内积几何构造的应变率是对称的并且没有反对称部分。我们进一步表明，当流体作为环境三维流的薄壳极限出现时，出现的算子取决于法线方向上施加的边界条件：无应力（纳维滑移）条件恢复变形拉普拉斯，而霍奇边界条件通过将环境博赫纳拉普拉斯显式分解为内在和外在部分来恢复霍奇拉普拉斯。

无论边界条件如何，内在部分都是变形拉普拉斯。作为分析确认，我们表明运动学选择与双曲平面 $\HH^2$ 上霍奇拉普拉斯能量不等式的已知失效一致：变形拉普拉斯对 $\HH^2$ 具有强制力，而霍奇拉普拉斯则不然，因为 Ricci 项在两个算子中具有相反的符号。我们进一步证明，在任何具有负常量的高斯曲率的完整二维流形上，具有变形拉普拉斯的不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯方程承认具有指数能量衰减的唯一全局弱解，解决了阻碍霍奇拉普拉斯得到相应结果的分析障碍。

title: Where solitons are in a KdV soliton gas
abstract: The Korteweg-De Vries (KdV) equation is a paradigmatic model of integrable classical fields, admitting solitoning solutions. When many solitons are near to each other, their shapes are modified, and it is not manifest, from the KdV field, where they are. This is a key problem in the analysis of a soliton gas, as its main object, the density of states, is a number of solitons per unit length. How to define solitons' positions at finite densities in the macroscopic limit? A sensible criterium is that, projecting out solitons lying outside a mesoscopic region, the KdV field is unchanged in this region, and the result is a multi-soliton field supported there. In the context of emergent hydrodynamics, this is referred to as a fluid-cell projection. In this paper we solve this problem. We define solitons' positions and a fluid-cell projection, and show that it has these properties, without introducing radiative corrections. We show that the weak limit of conserved densities can be evaluated using the density of states. On large scales the solitons' positions satisfy the semi-classical Bethe equations introduced in the context Generalised Hydrodynamics, that accounts for the two-body scattering shift and encodes factorised scattering. A non-rigorous derivation reproduces the kinetic equation of the KdV soliton gas, first proposed by Gennady El in 2003 using Witham modulation theory from finite-gap solutions. The results hold under simple conditions on spectral parameters, and certain physically natural conditions on impact parameters. No randomness is required. Our proof is based on a novel tau function for the multi-soliton KdV field, which also allows us to obtain new bounds on the growth of the multi-soliton support and on the supremum of the field and its derivatives. We believe the methods are generalisable to other solitonic models.
summary:
Korteweg-De Vries (KdV) 方程是可积经典场的范式模型，承认孤立解。当许多孤子彼此靠近时，它们的形状会发生变化，但从它们所在的 KdV 场来看并不明显。这是孤子气体分析中的一个关键问题，因为其主要对象，态密度，是单位长度的孤子数量。如何定义宏观极限下有限密度孤子的位置？一个合理的标准是，将孤子投影到介观区域之外，该区域的 KdV 场保持不变，结果是那里支持多孤子场。在新兴流体动力学的背景下，这被称为流体单元投影。在本文中我们解决了这个问题。我们定义了孤子的位置和流体细胞投影，并表明它具有这些属性，而无需引入辐射校正。我们证明，守恒密度的弱极限可以使用态密度来评估。

在大尺度上，孤子的位置满足广义流体动力学中引入的半经典贝特方程，该方程解释了二体散射位移并编码因式分解散射。非严格推导重现了 KdV 孤子气体的动力学方程，该方程由 Gennady El 在 2003 年首次使用 Witham 调制理论从有限间隙解中提出。该结果在光谱参数的简单条件下以及在冲击参数的某些物理自然条件下成立。不需要随机性。我们的证明基于多孤子 KdV 场的新颖 tau 函数，这也使我们能够获得多孤子支持增长以及场及其导数的上界的新界限。我们相信这些方法可以推广到其他孤子模型。

title: Arbitrary-genus dark soliton gases in the defocusing nonlinear Schrödinger hydrodynamics
abstract: The defocusing nonlinear Schrödinger hydrodynamics supports exact dark solitons under finite density boundary conditions. However, the dark soliton gas, an interacting ensemble of dark solitons, has not yet been studied. In this work, we introduce an arbitrary-genus potential of dark soliton gases by considering the limit of the $\mathcal{N}$-dark soliton as $\mathcal{N}\to \infty$. The large-space asymptotics and long-time evolution of this dark soliton gas potential are analytically investigated through Deift-Zhou nonlinear steepest descent approach. The genus-$N$ dark soliton gas potential approaches the genus-$N$ finite-gap solution as $x \to -\infty$ and the background $1$ as $x \to +\infty$. In the long-time evolution, as the self-similar variable $\xi=x/t$ increases, the gas configuration exhibits a cascade of behaviours, passing from unmodulated and modulated genus-$N$ regions and progressively reducing the genus down to the planar region (unmodulated genus-$0$ region). Notably, the evolution of lower-genus soliton gases can be embedded within that of higher-genus gases, exhibiting identical dynamics within specific regimes. This phenomenon is encoded by the underlying spectra. We also include numerical validations, in perfect agreement with the theoretical predictions.
summary:
散焦非线性薛定谔流体动力学支持有限密度边界条件下的精确暗孤子。然而，暗孤子气体（一种相互作用的暗孤子系综）尚未得到研究。在这项工作中，我们通过将 $\mathcal{N}$-暗孤子的极限考虑为 $\mathcal{N}\to \infty$ 来引入暗孤子气体的任意属势。通过Deift-Zhou非线性最速下降法分析研究了这种暗孤子气势的大空间渐近性和长期演化。属-$N$暗孤子气体势接近属-$N$有限间隙解为$x \to -\infty$，背景$1$为$x \to +\infty$。在长期演化过程中，随着自相似变量$\xi=x/t$的增加，气体构型表现出一系列的行为，从未调制和调制的属-$N$区域，逐渐减少属到平面区域（未调制的属-$0$区域）。值得注意的是，低属孤子气体的演化可以嵌入到高属气体的演化中，在特定范围内表现出相同的动力学。

这种现象是由底层光谱编码的。我们还进行了数值验证，与理论预测完全一致。

title: Traveling Waves and Bumps in $p$-adic NNs]{Pseudo-Traveling Waves and Bumps in Quantum and Classical Hierarchical Cellular Neural Networks
abstract: We study the existence of pseudo-traveling waves and bump solutions for two classes of hierarchical cellular neural networks (CNNs) defined over the ring of $p$-adic integers $\mathbb{Z}_{p}$. The first type is a $p$-adic CNN described by a reaction-diffusion equation, while the second type is its quantum analog obtained via Wick rotation. The $p$-adic CNNs are hierarchical versions of the classical Chua-Yang CNNs; these networks have a tree-like hierarchical architecture with infinitely many cells and hidden layers. The states are governed by integro-differential equations on $% \mathbb{Z}_{p}$. The $p$-adic traveling waves behave fundamentally differently from their Archimedean counterparts. A traveling wave restricted to a $p$-adic sphere yields a countably infinite collection of independent patterns. We introduce the notion of pseudo-traveling waves as finite truncations of this structure and prove their existence for both the classical and quantum networks. We further establish the existence of time-independent solutions (bumps) for both models. Our theoretical results are complemented by numerical simulations that approximate pseudo-traveling-wave solutions for quantum CNNs.
summary: 我们研究了在 $p$-adic 整数 $\mathbb{Z}_{p}$ 环上定义的两类分层细胞神经网络 (CNN) 的伪行波和凹凸解的存在性。第一种类型是通过反应扩散方程描述的 $p$-adic CNN，而第二种类型是通过 Wick 旋转获得的量子模拟。 $p$-adic CNN 是经典 Chua-Yang CNN 的分层版本；这些网络具有树状层次结构，具有无限多个单元和隐藏层。这些状态由 $% \mathbb{Z}_{p}$ 上的积分微分方程控制。 $p$-adic 行波的行为与阿基米德行波根本不同。限制在 $p$-adic 球体内的行波会产生可数无限的独立模式集合。我们引入伪行波的概念作为该结构的有限截断，并证明它们在经典网络和量子网络中的存在。我们进一步确定这两个模型都存在与时间无关的解（颠簸）。我们的理论结果得到了近似量子 CNN 伪行波解的数值模拟的补充。

authors.name: W. A. Zúñiga-Galindo; B. A. Zambrano-Luna

featured_authors.name: W. A. Zúñiga-Galindo; B. A. Zambrano-Luna

title: Beyond Bell Teleportation: Machine-Learned Adaptive Protocols
abstract: Quantum teleportation have a central role in quantum information science and allows transferring of an unknown quantum state through entanglement and classical communication. Unfortunately, the interaction with external and internal noise severely affects the quality of teleportation and poses limitations on practical applications of quantum communication networks. In this work, instead of conventional Bell teleportation, we introduce a Machine Learned adaptive protocol for optimizing multiple components of Quantum Teleportation in order to achieve higher fidelity in various noise environments. In order to demonstrate the performance of the proposed scheme, we study three different noise models, including bit-flip, amplitude damping, and depolarizing noise, both in case of single-qubit and two-qubit channels. As a result, we observe substantial improvement in the teleportation fidelity in comparison to the classical Bell-state teleportation protocol in certain noise conditions. Furthermore, the machine-learned protocol reveals a nontrivial strategy for compensation of decoherence and information losses. In addition, obtained results indicate the flexibility and reliability of the proposed framework for implementing various adaptive quantum communications while shedding light on possibilities of discovery of optimal quantum algorithms by means of automated approache
summary:
量子隐形传态在量子信息科学中发挥着核心作用，它允许通过纠缠和经典通信来转移未知的量子态。不幸的是，与外部和内部噪声的相互作用严重影响了隐形传输的质量，并对量子通信网络的实际应用造成了限制。在这项工作中，我们引入了机器学习自适应协议来优化量子隐形传态的多个组件，而不是传统的贝尔隐形传态，以便在各种噪声环境中实现更高的保真度。为了证明所提出方案的性能，我们研究了三种不同的噪声模型，包括单量子位和双量子位通道的情况下的位翻转、振幅阻尼和去极化噪声。因此，我们观察到在某些噪声条件下，与经典贝尔态隐形传态协议相比，隐形传态保真度有了显着提高。此外，机器学习协议揭示了一种补偿退相干和信息损失的重要策略。

此外，获得的结果表明所提出的框架用于实现各种自适应量子通信的灵活性和可靠性，同时揭示了通过自动化方法发现最佳量子算法的可能性。

title: Robust generalized quantum Stein's lemma
abstract: The generalized quantum Stein's lemma provides an explicit expression for the optimal error exponent when distinguishing many independent and identically distributed (iid) copies of a given bipartite state from the set of separable bipartite states. Here we prove that this result is robust, in the sense that the iid assumption can be relaxed to almost-iid. In particular, our result shows that the original argument of Brandão and Plenio, which contains a logical gap, can be made rigorous. Our proof relies on a novel continuity bound for the relative entropy of entanglement with respect to the quantum Wasserstein distance. Combined with a recent insight that almost-iid states and their exact iid counterparts are asymptotically close in this distance, the bound implies that their relative entropies of entanglement coincide asymptotically.
summary: 当从一组可分离的二分状态中区分给定二分状态的许多独立同分布 (iid) 副本时，广义量子斯坦因引理为最佳误差指数提供了显式表达式。在这里，我们证明这个结果是稳健的，因为独立同分布假设可以放宽到几乎独立同分布。特别是，我们的结果表明，Brandão 和 Plenio 的原始论证存在逻辑差距，可以变得严谨。我们的证明依赖于量子 Wasserstein 距离的纠缠相对熵的新颖连续性界限。结合最近的见解，即几乎独立同分布状态及其精确的独立同分布状态在这个距离上渐近接近，该界限意味着它们的纠缠相对熵渐近一致。

title: Quokka#: Quantum Computing with #SAT
abstract: We present Quokka#, a versatile, open-source Python library for quantum circuit analysis. Quokka# reduces various simulation, verification, and synthesis tasks to weighted model counting (#SAT). It supports universal quantum circuits and a wide variety of gates. Quokka# provides multiple encodings based on different algebraic bases and equivalence-checking methods, enabling key performance trade-offs. Moreover, the new version of Quokka# adds approximate equivalence checking, which is crucial in its synthesis algorithms, since it enables translation between arbitrary gate sets. Its synthesis engine is depth-optimal, making it well-suited to real-world quantum computing. This paper demonstrates the design, extensibility, and use of Quokka#.
summary: 我们推出 Quokka#，一个用于量子电路分析的多功能开源 Python 库。 Quokka# 将各种模拟、验证和综合任务简化为加权模型计数 (#SAT)。它支持通用量子电路和各种门。 Quokka# 提供基于不同代数基和等价检查方法的多种编码，从而实现关键性能权衡。此外，新版本的 Quokka# 增加了近似等价检查，这在其综合算法中至关重要，因为它可以在任意门集之间进行转换。其合成引擎是深度优化的，非常适合现实世界的量子计算。本文演示了 Quokka# 的设计、可扩展性和使用。

title: Exact classical emergence from high-energy quantum superpositions
abstract: We examine the correspondence principle for an equiprobable superposition of high-energy eigenstates of the infinite square well using a fully analytical Fourier-based approach. We derive a closed-form asymptotic expression for the interference terms $\rho_{\alpha}^{\text{a}}(x)$ by expanding them into a geometric series of quantum Fourier coefficients. We show these terms act as functional envelopes that do not vanish individually but become asymptotically equivalent in the large-$n$ limit. Furthermore, we prove the total probability density for a superposition of $2\Delta+1$ states converges exactly to the uniform classical distribution as $\Delta \to \infty$. Dynamically, the expectation value of position reproduces the classical triangular trajectory asymptotically. Residual quantum deviations remain confined to boundary layers whose relative width vanishes under macroscopic resolution. These results establish a rigorous asymptotic realization of the classical limit for isolated bound systems in both static and dynamical contexts.
summary: 我们使用基于傅立叶的完全分析方法研究了无限方阱高能本征态等概率叠加的对应原理。我们通过将干扰项 $\rho_{\alpha}^{\text{a}}(x)$ 展开为量子傅里叶系数的几何级数，推导出干扰项 $\rho_{\alpha}^{\text{a}}(x)$ 的封闭式渐近表达式。我们证明这些项充当功能包络，它们不会单独消失，而是在大 $n$ 限制中渐近等效。此外，我们证明 $2\Delta+1$ 状态叠加的总概率密度完全收敛于均匀经典分布 $\Delta \to \infty$。动态地，位置的期望值渐近地再现了经典的三角轨迹。残余量子偏差仍然局限于边界层，其相对宽度在宏观分辨率下消失。这些结果在静态和动态环境中建立了孤立束缚系统经典极限的严格渐近实现。

title: End-to-End Formalization of Quantum Error Correction
abstract: Quantum error-correcting codes (QECCs) sit between noisy quantum hardware and reliable computation, so the code parameters used in practice must be trustworthy. The single number that summarizes a code's strength is its distance, yet certifying a distance lower bound is NP-hard in general, placing it beyond the reach of pen-and-paper proofs as well as direct proof-assistant scripting. As a result, distance values in the literature come either from non-scaling hand proofs, or from unverified solvers that leave a trust gap exactly where the code is supposed to provide a guarantee. We present Lean-QEC, the first Lean 4 formalization of stabilizer-code theory that delivers end-to-end, machine-checked distance certificates at industrial code sizes. Lean-QEC formalizes the linear algebra of qubit states, the Pauli group, stabilizer codes, the binary symplectic representation, classical coding theory, and the CSS and Bivariate Bicycle families. To break the combinatorial barrier, Lean-QEC translates the distance condition into a Boolean satisfiability formula through a verified reduction. The pipeline scales through a BitVec-flattened encoding that replaces Lean's Matrix representation, and an error-location encoding that reduces the variable count from $n$ to $k\lceil \log_2 n\rceil$. With these, we obtain automatically-generated Lean-checked distance proofs for a large range of industrially viable qLDPC codes within the Bivariate Bicycle and Generalized Bicycle families, including [[90, 8, 10]] and [[70, 6, 9]] BB codes, with the formulation scaling up to 144 qubits when performed outside the Lean kernel. The resulting library is reusable and is designed to plug into broader Lean-based efforts toward end-to-end verification of fault-tolerant quantum computation.
summary:
量子纠错码（QECC）位于嘈杂的量子硬件和可靠计算之间，因此实际使用的代码参数必须是可信的。总结代码强度的唯一数字是它的距离，但证明距离下限通常是 NP 困难的，这超出了纸笔证明以及直接证明辅助脚本的范围。因此，文献中的距离值要么来自非缩放的手工证明，要么来自未经验证的求解器，这些求解器在代码应该提供保证的地方留下了信任差距。我们推出 Lean-QEC，这是稳定器代码理论的第一个 Lean 4 形式化，它以工业代码大小提供端到端、机器检查的距离证书。 Lean-QEC 形式化了量子位态的线性代数、泡利群、稳定器码、二元辛表示、经典编码理论以及 CSS 和双变量 Bicycle 系列。为了打破组合障碍，Lean-QEC 通过验证的归约将距离条件转换为布尔可满足性公式。

该管道通过取代 Lean 矩阵表示的 BitVec 扁平化编码和将变量计数从 $n$ 减少到 $k\lceil \log_2 n\rceil$ 的错误定位编码进行扩展。通过这些，我们获得了双变量 Bicycle 和广义 Bicycle 系列中大量工业上可行的 qLDPC 代码的自动生成的精益检查距离证明，包括 [[90,8,10]] 和 [[70,6,9]] BB 代码，当在精益内核之外执行时，公式可扩展至 144 个量子位。由此产生的库是可重用的，旨在插入更广泛的基于精益的工作，以实现容错量子计算的端到端验证。

title: Demonstration of transport in an ion trap design for two-dimensional lattices
abstract: Microfabricated ion trap chips are at the core of some of the most advanced quantum computers. How a large number of ions is arranged and controlled on an ion trap chip depends on the chosen trap architecture. One such architecture is the quantum spring array (QSA). In the QSA architecture, ion chains are arranged in a two-dimensional lattice and interact with ion chains in neighboring sites in the radial and axial directions of the respective chain. This interaction, or coupling, is mediated by the Coulomb force while keeping ions in separate trapping sites, and scales inversely with the third power of the separation. The capability to control the distance between ions in the lattice is thus essential. In previous works, the radial separation between ions was tuned by controlling the rf pseudo-potential, which revealed to be experimentally challenging to realize while maintaining low heating rates. In this work, we present an ion trap chip design that allows tuning of the radial distance between ions using only dc voltages. The radial transport is executed between different interaction zones, designated for quantum operations, through specifically designed transition zones. A prototype of this type of ion trap chip was microfabricated on fused silica substrate. Its functionality is characterized by demonstrating dc-controlled radial transport of a single ion through a transition zone and measuring stray fields and ion heating rates in the center of the trap. Moreover, the fabrication of a multi-metal layer version of such a trap is presented as a scaling path for the presented chip design.
summary:
微加工离子阱芯片是一些最先进量子计算机的核心。如何在离子阱芯片上排列和控制大量离子取决于所选的陷阱架构。其中一种架构是量子弹簧阵列（QSA）。在QSA架构中，离子链排列在二维晶格中，并与相应链的径向和轴向相邻位点的离子链相互作用。这种相互作用或耦合是由库仑力介导的，同时将离子保持在单独的捕获位点，并且与分离的三次方成反比。因此，控制晶格中离子之间距离的能力至关重要。在之前的工作中，通过控制射频赝势来调节离子之间的径向分离，这表明在保持低加热速率的同时实现这一点在实验上具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种离子阱芯片设计，它允许仅使用直流电压来调整离子之间的径向距离。通过专门设计的过渡区域，在指定用于量子操作的不同相互作用区域之间执行径向传输。

这种类型的离子阱芯片的原型是在熔融石英基板上微加工的。其功能的特点是演示单个离子通过过渡区的直流控制径向传输，并测量陷阱中心的杂散场和离子加热速率。此外，这种陷阱的多金属层版本的制造被提出作为所提出的芯片设计的缩放路径。

title: Measurement and Control of the Complex Berry Phase in a Quantum System
abstract: The Berry phase is a geometric phase acquired during adiabatic evolution over a closed loop in parameter space. It plays an essential role in geometric quantum gates and other phase-based protocols. In non-Hermitian systems, the Berry phase is complex, introducing fundamentally new geometric effects, including state amplification. In this work, we report experimental measurement of both the real and imaginary components of a Berry phase in a fully quantum system using a superconducting transmon circuit with engineered dissipation. We also demonstrate the path-dependent effects of the imaginary part on the dissipation and its utility in the implementation of non-unitary quantum control. These findings establish a clear geometric distinction between the real and imaginary components of the Berry phase and experimentally confirm the unique adiabatic behavior of non-Hermitian quantum systems.
summary: 贝里相是在参数空间闭环绝热演化过程中获得的几何相。它在几何量子门和其他基于相位的协议中发挥着重要作用。在非厄米系统中，贝里相很复杂，引入了全新的几何效应，包括状态放大。在这项工作中，我们报告了使用具有工程耗散的超导传输电路对全量子系统中贝里相的实部和虚部进行的实验测量。我们还证明了虚部对耗散的路径依赖效应及其在非酉量子控制实现中的效用。这些发现在贝里相的实部和虚部之间建立了明显的几何区别，并通过实验证实了非厄米量子系统的独特绝热行为。

title: Optimization of circular cavities via guided-mode expansion method based inverse design
abstract: Spin-photon interfaces, realized by coupling optically active spin systems to photonic cavities, are essential for quantum networking and quantum information processing. Implementing such an interface for polarization-encoded photons requires a cavity that supports arbitrary polarization, provides efficient optical access through its far-field mode, and maintains sufficiently high quality factors to enable high cooperativity with the system's optical transitions. However, inherent trade-offs between the Q-factor and far-field emission mode make the simultaneous optimization of these parameters toward the realization of spin-photon interfaces challenging. In this work, we implement a gradient-based inverse-design framework using guided-mode expansion with automatic differentiation to obtain the geometrical features of a circular ring cavity that supports arbitrary polarization while simultaneously optimizing the cavity quality factor and far-field mode profile. The resulting optimized non-periodic cavity achieves a quality factor of approximately $9,000$, about an order-of-magnitude higher than that of a periodic ("bullseye") cavity while preserving a Gaussian-like far-field emission pattern. Furthermore, by varying the cavity geometry within a $\pm 6$ nm fabrication tolerance, we demonstrate the robustness of the design against fabrication errors and identify the innermost ring width and central disk radius as the parameters with the greatest impact on the quality factor and far-field mode. These results establish guided mode expansion-based inverse design as a powerful and computationally efficient approach for developing high-cooperativity spin-photon interfaces for quantum photonic applications.
summary:
自旋光子接口是通过将光学活性自旋系统耦合到光子腔而实现的，对于量子网络和量子信息处理至关重要。实现这种偏振编码光子接口需要一个支持任意偏振的腔体，通过其远场模式提供有效的光学访问，并保持足够高的品质因数以实现与系统光学转换的高协作性。然而，Q 因子和远场发射模式之间固有的权衡使得同时优化这些参数以实现自旋光子界面具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们使用具有自动微分的导模扩展实现了基于梯度的逆设计框架，以获得支持任意偏振的圆环腔的几何特征，同时优化腔品质因数和远场模式轮廓。

由此产生的优化非周期腔的品质因数约为 9,000 美元，比周期（“牛眼”）腔的品质因数高出大约一个数量级，同时保留了类似高斯的远场发射模式。此外，通过在 $\pm 6$ nm 制造公差内改变腔体几何形状，我们证明了设计针对制造误差的稳健性，并将最内环宽度和中心盘半径确定为对品质因数和远场模式影响最大的参数。这些结果将基于导模展开的逆设计确立为一种强大且计算高效的方法，用于开发用于量子光子应用的高协同性自旋光子接口。

title: Spatially Adaptive Detection for Satellite-based QKD under Atmospheric Turbulence Channel
abstract: Quantum key distribution (QKD) provides information-theoretic security and satellite-based quantum key distribution (SatQKD) has demonstrated the potential to extend this communication security to intercontinental scales. However, atmospheric turbulence induces significant distortion in the spatial distribution of received optical beams, while background noise remains approximately uniform across the detector plane. As a result, single-element qubit (quantum bit) detection can be frequently dominated by noise due to the random spatial pattern of the imaged wavefront, thereby degrading the system performance. To address this limitation, we propose to exploit the spatial degrees of freedom of single-photon detector arrays to reject the excessive noise while adapting to channel variations induced by turbulence. We develop a threshold-based selection method that only activates detector elements that have higher probability of registering qubits. We evaluate the performance of the proposed noise-rejection QKD schemes using Monte Carlo simulations considering the impact of diffraction and atmospheric turbulence on the transmitted optical beam in the presence of background and dark noise. The results show that, compared to conventional schemes, the proposed noise-rejection strategy effectively reduces the quantum bit error rate (QBER) and improves the secret key rate (SKR) performance, while the performance gains depend on the turbulence condition. These findings demonstrate the potential of adaptive array receiver design to enhance the robustness of the SatQKD system under realistic atmospheric conditions.
summary:
量子密钥分发 (QKD) 提供信息论安全性，而基于卫星的量子密钥分发 (SatQKD) 已证明具有将这种通信安全性扩展到洲际规模的潜力。然而，大气湍流会导致接收光束的空间分布发生显着失真，而背景噪声在整个探测器平面上保持大致均匀。因此，由于成像波前的随机空间模式，单元件量子位（量子位）检测可能经常受到噪声的支配，从而降低系统性能。为了解决这个限制，我们建议利用单光子探测器阵列的空间自由度来抑制过多的噪声，同时适应湍流引起的通道变化。我们开发了一种基于阈值的选择方法，仅激活具有较高注册量子位概率的探测器元件。我们使用蒙特卡罗模拟来评估所提出的噪声抑制 QKD 方案的性能，考虑到存在背景和暗噪声的情况下衍射和大气湍流对传输光束的影响。

结果表明，与传统方案相比，所提出的噪声抑制策略有效降低了量子误码率（QBER）并提高了密钥率（SKR）性能，而性能增益取决于湍流条件。这些发现证明了自适应阵列接收器设计在增强 SatQKD 系统在现实大气条件下的鲁棒性方面的潜力。

title: Boundary-Aware QFT Block-Encoding of Fractional Laplacians
abstract: We study the quantum Fourier transform (QFT) block-encoding of the semi-discrete fractional Laplacian on bounded domains with open, zero-extension boundary conditions. In the notation of the main construction, the target operator is the finite Toeplitz truncation \(A^{(N)}_{\alpha,h}\) obtained from the full-lattice semi-discrete operator with symbol \(|\xi|^\alpha\). A finite QFT register, however, diagonalizes circulant matrices rather than Toeplitz truncations. The native QFT circuit therefore implements a periodic surrogate \(\widetilde A^{(N)}_{\alpha,h}\), not the open-boundary operator. We identify this mismatch through an exact Toeplitz-to-circulant aliasing identity. To recover the open-boundary action, we zero-pad the state into a larger \(M\)-point QFT register, apply the same Fourier-symbol block-encoding, and compress back to the physical subspace. The resulting compressed block satisfies \(P_{N\to M}^{\dagger}\widetilde A^{(M)}_{\alpha,h}P_{N\to M} = A^{(N)}_{\alpha,h}+E^{(M)}\), where \(E^{(M)}\) is controlled by the tail of the semi-discrete convolution kernel. Thus, the QFT layer implements the fractional symbol, while zero-padding supplies the open-boundary geometry. The construction is an operator-compilation primitive for boundary-aware quantum simulation rather than a complete PDE solver.
summary:
我们研究了具有开放、零扩展边界条件的有界域上半离散分数拉普拉斯算子的量子傅里叶变换（QFT）块编码。在主结构的表示法中，目标算子是从符号为\(|\xi|^\alpha\)的全格半离散算子得到的有限Toeplitz截断\(A^{(N)}_{\alpha,h}\)。然而，有限 QFT 寄存器对循环矩阵进行对角化，而不是托普利茨截断。因此，本机 QFT 电路实现了周期性代理 \(\widetilde A^{(N)}_{\alpha,h}\)，而不是开放边界运算符。我们通过精确的 Toeplitz-to-circulant 别名标识来识别这种不匹配。为了恢复开放边界动作，我们将状态零填充到更大的 M 点 QFT 寄存器中，应用相同的傅里叶符号块编码，然后压缩回物理子空间。得到的压缩块满足 \(P_{N\to M}^{\dagger}\widetilde A^{(M)}_{\alpha,h}P_{N\to M} = A^{(N)}_{\alpha,h}+E^{(M)}\)，其中 \(E^{(M)}\) 由半离散卷积核的尾部控制。

因此，QFT 层实现小数符号，而零填充则提供开放边界几何。该构造是用于边界感知量子模拟的算子编译原语，而不是完整的 PDE 求解器。

title: Central Limit Theorem for Bosonic Quantum Channels
abstract: In this paper, we develop an extension of the Central Limit Theorem (CLT) to the setting of bosonic quantum channels. This extension provides a deeper understanding of Gaussian bosonic channels as extremal objects. Using our CLT for bosonic quantum channels, we recover both the classical CLT and the CLT for bosonic quantum states, thereby offering a unified perspective that connects classical probability theory with continuous-variable quantum systems. Moreover, using our result, we can provide necessary uncertainty relations that every physical (possibly non-Gaussian) bosonic quantum channel must satisfy. As another application of our limit theorems, we derive tight lower bounds on the energy-constrained quantum capacity of linear bosonic channels by relating it to the capacity of their associated Gaussian bosonic channels, further reinforcing the role of Gaussian channels as extremal.
summary: 在本文中，我们将中心极限定理（CLT）扩展到玻色子量子通道的设置。这一扩展提供了对高斯玻色子通道作为极值对象的更深入的理解。使用我们的玻色量子通道 CLT，我们恢复了经典 CLT 和玻色量子态 CLT，从而提供了将经典概率论与连续变量量子系统连接起来的统一视角。此外，利用我们的结果，我们可以提供每个物理（可能是非高斯）玻色子量子通道必须满足的必要不确定性关系。作为极限定理的另一个应用，我们通过将线性玻色子通道的能量约束量子容量与其相关的高斯玻色子通道的容量相关联，得出了严格的下界，进一步强化了高斯通道作为极值的作用。

title: Exact Entanglement-Depth Speed Frontier for Complete Quantum Charging
abstract: Complete quantum charging provides a sharp setting in which to ask how much multipartite entanglement is forced by speed itself. For a closed \(N\)-qubit battery evolving from \(\ket{\downarrow}^{\otimes N}\) to \(\ket{\uparrow}^{\otimes N}\) under a time-independent Hamiltonian, we exactly solve the pure-state depth-constrained speed problem. If the realized trajectory has entanglement depth at most \(k\), then the largest possible QSL-normalized rate \(\eta=\tau_{\rm QSL}/T\) is \(\eta_{\max}(k)=\lceil N/k\rceil^{-1/2}\). Conversely, an observed rate \(\eta\) certifies trajectory entanglement depth at least \(\bigl\lceil N/\lfloor \eta^{-2}\rfloor\bigr\rceil\). The mechanism is block orthogonalization: under a fixed product partition, complete charging forces all blocks to orthogonalize simultaneously, and the quantum speed limit converts this counting constraint into the speed bound. Balanced cluster-flip evolutions saturate the bound, establishing an exact integer staircase frontier. Thus fast complete charging cannot be explained by many small independently charging blocks; in particular, crossing the threshold \(\eta>1/\sqrt2\) certifies, for \(N>1\), the generation of genuine \(N\)-partite entanglement.
summary:
完整的量子充电提供了一个尖锐的环境，可以在其中询问速度本身迫使多少多部分纠缠。对于在与时间无关的哈密顿量下从 \(\ket{\downarrow}^{\otimes N}\) 演化到 \(\ket{\uparrow}^{\otimes N}\) 的封闭 \(N\) 量子位电池，我们精确地解决了纯态深度约束速度问题。如果实现的轨迹最多具有\(k\)纠缠深度，则最大可能的QSL归一化速率\(\eta=\tau_{\rm QSL}/T\)为\(\eta_{\max}(k)=\lceil N/k\rceil^{-1/2}\)。相反，观察到的速率 \(\eta\) 证明轨迹纠缠深度至少为 \(\bigl\lceil N/\lfloor \eta^{-2}\rfloor\bigr\rceil\)。其机制是块正交化：在固定的乘积划分下，完整的充电迫使所有块同时正交，并且量子速度限制将这种计数约束转换为速度界限。平衡的簇翻转演化使边界饱和，建立精确的整数阶梯边界。

因此快速完全充电不能用许多小的独立充电块来解释；特别是，跨越阈值 \(\eta>1/\sqrt2\) 证明，对于 \(N>1\)，真正的 \(N\) 部分纠缠的生成。

title: Efficient Hamiltonian Engineering for Adiabatic MIS Algorithms
abstract: We present a hybrid adiabatic algorithm for maximum independent set (MIS) using Rydberg atom arrays. We engineer local controls that preferentially excite atoms with few neighbors, which represent graph nodes with small degrees. Numerical simulations show that the designed pulses accelerate convergence to the MIS state and suppress population in trap states. We obtain higher success probabilities than traditional global controls and a $25\%$ reduction in fidelity decay rate as problem hardness increases.
summary: 我们提出了一种使用里德堡原子阵列的最大独立集（MIS）的混合绝热算法。我们设计了局部控制，优先激发邻居较少的原子，这些原子代表度数较小的图节点。数值模拟表明，设计的脉冲加速了向 MIS 态的收敛，并抑制了陷阱态的布居。与传统的全局控制相比，我们获得了更高的成功概率，并且随着问题难度的增加，保真度衰减率降低了 25\%$。

title: From Constraint to Code: DQI-Kit -- A Software Framework for Decoded Quantum Interferometry
abstract: Trying to solve hard optimisation problems with quantum techniques requires transformations of domain objectives and constraints into formats compatible with a chosen quantum algorithm. This often introduces inefficiencies and overheads that limit or even endanger potential quantum advantage for current and future approaches. To understand and mitigate these inefficiencies, software toolchains are essential for implementing transformations, analysing overheads and eventually selecting optimal transformation paths. Decoded Quantum Interferometry (DQI) is a novel approach that achieves apparent quantum advantage for certain algebraic optimisation problems. It natively operates on Max-LINSAT, which is unusual for combinatorial optimisation, and creates the need for software solutions that alleviate the burden of manually transforming problems of interest into this format. We present DQI-Kit, a software framework that provides a unified, extensible interface for automatically encoding constrained optimisation problems into Max-LINSAT. Users can describe the various types of objectives and constraints that are common in industrial optimisation problems. Our framework converts these into Max-LINSAT instances via a series of problem transformations and computes an estimate of the expected performance of DQI on these instances. We provide an initial analysis of the implemented transformations, discussing inefficiencies and ways to mitigate them. DQI-Kit is the basis for our ultimate goal of establishing a standardised framework that will enable further investigations to identify practical use cases for which quantum advantage with DQI can be achieved.
summary:
尝试使用量子技术解决硬优化问题需要将领域目标和约束转换为与所选量子算法兼容的格式。这通常会带来低效率和开销，限制甚至危及当前和未来方法的潜在量子优势。为了了解和缓解这些低效率问题，软件工具链对于实施转型、分析开销并最终选择最佳转型路径至关重要。解码量子干涉测量 (DQI) 是一种新颖的方法，可以在某些代数优化问题上实现明显的量子优势。它本身在 Max-LINSAT 上运行，这对于组合优化来说是不常见的，并且需要软件解决方案来减轻手动将感兴趣的问题转换为这种格式的负担。我们推出了 DQI-Kit，这是一个软件框架，它提供了一个统一的、可扩展的接口，用于自动将约束优化问题编码到 Max-LINSAT 中。用户可以描述工业优化问题中常见的各种类型的目标和约束。

我们的框架通过一系列问题转换将这些实例转换为 Max-LINSAT 实例，并计算 DQI 在这些实例上的预期性能的估计值。我们对已实施的转型进行初步分析，讨论效率低下的问题以及缓解这些问题的方法。 DQI-Kit 是我们建立标准化框架这一最终目标的基础，该框架将能够进行进一步的研究，以确定可以利用 DQI 实现量子优势的实际用例。

title: Quantum Optical Soliton Dynamics Beyond Linearization: An Open-System Approach
abstract: We introduce two approaches to modeling the quantum dynamics of optical $\chi^{(3)}$ solitons. Taking an open-system viewpoint, we project the underlying quantum field into system (soliton) and residual reservoir components. The reservoir is treated as either (i) a discrete ``Lanczos supermode'' (LSM) expansion which localizes dynamics to a few-supermode basis, or (ii) a non-local environment which can be traced out by deriving a Markovian master equation (ME). Using these methods, we analyze and identify the quantum structure of both the soliton's stability and its hierarchy of perturbations. Through numerical simulations, we confirm both methods effectively capture quantum-induced soliton phase shifts in a concise few-mode (single-mode for ME) basis, and the LSM approach also captures photon loss which arises from non-Markovian dispersive couplings. As neither method is limited to the linearized regime, our approaches provide powerful computational tools to analyze complex non-Gaussian quantum dynamics of solitons where other commonly-used methods fail, providing insight into such non-perturbative regimes. We also investigate radiation that occurs in the presence of higher-order dispersion with ultrashort pulses, deriving a ME that predicts photon loss consistent with classical theory, but find that both classical and ME theory dramatically underestimate the actual amount of dissipation, which we explain in terms of dispersive coupling-induced soliton broadening.
summary:
我们引入了两种方法来模拟光学 $\chi^{(3)}$ 孤子的量子动力学。从开放系统的角度来看，我们将底层量子场投影到系统（孤子）和剩余储层组件中。储层被视为 (i) 离散“Lanczos 超模”(LSM) 展开，将动力学局部化到少数超模基础，或 (ii) 可以通过推导马尔可夫主方程 (ME) 来追踪的非局部环境。使用这些方法，我们分析和识别了孤子稳定性及其扰动层次的量子结构。通过数值模拟，我们确认这两种方法都能在简洁的少模（M​​E 为单模）基础上有效捕获量子诱导的孤子相移，并且 LSM 方法还捕获由非马尔可夫色散耦合引起的光子损失。由于这两种方法都不限于线性化区域，因此我们的方法提供了强大的计算工具来分析其他常用方法无法做到的复杂的孤子非高斯量子动力学，从而提供对此类非微扰区域的深入了解。

我们还研究了在超短脉冲存在高阶色散的情况下发生的辐射，得出与经典理论一致的预测光子损失的 ME，但发现经典理论和 ME 理论都大大低估了实际耗散量，我们用色散耦合引起的孤子展宽来解释这一点。

title: Near-Optimal Quantum Time Evolution Circuits via Provably Convergent Compression
abstract: Variational compression can significantly lower implementation overheads for encoding the time evolution of Hamiltonians into quantum circuits. However, they usually lack global convergence guarantees and well-established scaling behavior. In this work, we provide a recipe for choosing the initial point of such variational optimizations that guarantees convergence to a quantum circuit with near-optimal gate complexity $\mathcal{O}\left( N \, t \, \text{polylog}(N \, t/\epsilon) \right)$ for all local and translationally invariant Hamiltonians. We demonstrate our method by encoding the globally controlled time evolution of a Heisenberg antiferromagnet on a Kagome lattice. For $N = 48$ sites, evolution time $t=0.1$ and infidelity $\epsilon\approx1\%$, the controlled time-evolution circuit requires 960 two-qubit B gates, for which we propose a straightforward implementation scheme for ion-trap setups. Thereby, our recipe extends digital quantum simulators toward system sizes and geometries that are challenging for classical computation.
summary: 变分压缩可以显着降低将哈密顿量的时间演化编码到量子电路中的实现开销。然而，它们通常缺乏全局收敛保证和完善的扩展行为。在这项工作中，我们提供了选择此类变分优化初始点的方法，保证所有局部和平移不变哈密顿量收敛到具有接近最优门复杂度 $\mathcal{O}\left( N \, t \, \text{polylog}(N \, t/\epsilon) \right)$ 的量子电路。我们通过对 Kagome 晶格上的海森堡反铁磁体的全局控制时间演化进行编码来演示我们的方法。对于 $N = 48$ 个位点，演化时间 $t=0.1$ 和不忠实度 $\epsilon\approx1\%$，受控时间演化电路需要 960 个双量子位 B 门，为此我们提出了一种用于离子阱设置的简单实现方案。因此，我们的方案将数字量子模拟器扩展到对经典计算具有挑战性的系统尺寸和几何形状。

title: Truncated-Binary Encoding: Spectral Degree Reduction of Combinatorial Optimization Problems for Quantum Hardware
abstract: Exact-binary encoding compiles a discrete cost function network (CFN) into a higher-order unconstrained binary optimization (HUBO) problem whose maximum monomial degree grows with the cardinalities of the underlying CFN variables. Given that quantum optimization hardware generally favours quadratic unconstrained binary optimization or low-degree HUBO Hamiltonians, high-cardinality CFNs therefore incur substantial overhead in the form of circuit depth, or ancilla qubits when degree-reduction techniques are employed. To ameliorate these issues, we propose \textit{truncated-binary encoding} (TBE): a modification of exact-binary encoding in which Ising-basis monomials exceeding a chosen cutoff $k_\text{max}$ are dropped from the encoded cost. We establish a tight $L^\infty$ bound on the truncation error in terms of the omitted couplings, derive sufficient conditions on the energy gap and on the single bit-flip basin barrier under which TBE preserves the global minimum and its local-minimum structure, and characterize a noise floor condition on the spectral profile under which the truncation residual acts as a perturbative correction to the underlying landscape. We then express the encoded coefficients directly as Walsh transforms of the underlying CFN cost tables, and prove a bound under which smoothness of each cost table implies rapid decay of its high-degree Walsh mass. Together these results yield a principled \textit{a priori} criterion for selecting $k_\text{max}$ and for judging whether a given CFN admits a small-$k_\text{max}$ TBE.
summary:
精确二进制编码将离散成本函数网络 (CFN) 编译为高阶无约束二进制优化 (HUBO) 问题，其最大单项式度随着底层 CFN 变量的基数而增长。鉴于量子优化硬件通常倾向于二次无约束二元优化或低度 HUBO 哈密顿量，因此，当采用度数缩减技术时，高基数 CFN 会以电路深度或辅助量子位的形式产生大量开销。为了改善这些问题，我们提出 \textit{截断二进制编码} (TBE)：一种精确二进制编码的修改，其中超出所选截止值 $k_\text{max}$ 的伊辛基单项式从编码成本中删除。我们根据省略的耦合在截断误差上建立了严格的 $L^\infty$ 界限，导出了能隙和单位翻转盆地势垒的充分条件，在该条件下 TBE 保留了全局最小值及其局部最小结构，并表征了光谱剖面上的本底噪声条件，在该条件下截断残差充当了对底层景观的扰动校正。

然后，我们将编码系数直接表示为基础 CFN 成本表的沃尔什变换，并证明每个成本表的平滑度意味着其高阶沃尔什质量的快速衰减的界限。这些结果共同产生了一个有原则的\textit{先验}标准，用于选择$k_\text{max}$并判断给定的CFN是否承认小$k_\text{max}$ TBE。

title: Scaling Quantum Optimization for Unit Commitment via Pauli Correlation Encoding
abstract: Unit commitment is an important optimization problem in power system operations, classified as NP-hard. This paper presents a hybrid quantum-classical method for the unit commitment problem with time-dependent constraints, where decisions must be made about which generators to turn on/off and how much power they should produce over a planning horizon. We use a hybrid quantum-classical optimization procedure to determine the on/off schedules of the generating units and the corresponding power dispatch that satisfies operational constraints such as load balance, generator limits, ramping, and reserve requirements. We frame the optimization loop as a leader-follower structure, where the quantum optimizer leads to give the on/off decisions, and the classical optimizer follows to produce the power level schedule. Leveraging Pauli-Correlation Encoding, our method scales to horizon-wide unit commitment schedules by encoding the binary variables with far fewer qubits. By combining these components, the method can handle multi-period settings while using far fewer qubits than straightforward quantum encodings that allocate one qubit per decision variable as in prior approaches. We evaluate the approach on both small- and large-scale instances, up to 312 binary variables, and show that it reliably produces feasible schedules with competitive operating costs.
summary:
机组组合是电力系统运行中一个重要的优化问题，属于NP难问题。本文提出了一种混合量子经典方法，用于解决具有时间相关约束的机组投入问题，其中必须决定打开/关闭哪些发电机以及它们在规划范围内应产生多少电力。我们使用混合量子经典优化程序来确定发电机组的开/关时间表以及满足负载平衡、发电机限制、爬坡和储备要求等运行约束的相应电力调度。我们将优化循环构建为领导者-跟随者结构，其中量子优化器导致给出开/关决策，经典优化器随后产生功率级别调度。利用泡利相关编码，我们的方法通过用更少的量子位对二进制变量进行编码，扩展到水平范围内的单元承诺计划。通过组合这些组件，该方法可以处理多周期设置，同时使用比先前方法中为每个决策变量分配一个量子位的直接量子编码少得多的量子位。

我们在小型和大型实例（最多 312 个二元变量）上评估该方法，并表明它可以可靠地生成具有竞争力的运营成本的可行时间表。

title: Module Lattice Security (Part IV): Probabilistic Polynomial Quantum Attack on Module-LWE over 2-Power Cyclotomics
abstract: We present a quantum attack on ML-KEM and related 2-power cyclotomic lattice schemes. Combining with Parts I-III, we provide an algorithm and verify the resulting approximation factor satisfies $\gamma \le 21 < q/2=1665$ for ML-KEM-1024, with a success probability $\ge 0.99$. We apply a tower decomposition of the Principal Ideal Problem (PIP) through the chain $\Q \subset \Q(\zeta_8) \subset \cdots \subset \Q(\zeta_{2^k})$ which yields a polynomial-time quantum algorithm costing $O(n^3 \log^2 n)$ gates, $O(n^2 \log n)$ qubits, and $\mathrm{poly}(n)$ classical bit operations. We extend the analysis to Falcon, Hawk, and NTRU over 2-power cyclotomic rings. This means that ML-KEM, Falcon, Hawk, NTRU-HPS, and NTRU-HRSS with all standardized parameter sets are broken under quantum attack.
summary: 我们提出了对 ML-KEM 和相关 2 次分圆晶格方案的量子攻击。结合第 I-III 部分，我们提供了一种算法，并验证了对于 ML-KEM-1024，所得近似因子满足 $\gamma \le 21 < q/2=1665$，成功概率 $\ge 0.99$。我们通过链 $\Q \subset \Q(\zeta_8) \subset \cdots \subset \Q(\zeta_{2^k})$ 应用主理想问题 (PIP) 的塔式分解，产生一个多项式时间量子算法，成本为 $O(n^3 \log^2 n)$ 门、$O(n^2 \log n)$ 量子位和 $\mathrm{poly}(n)$ 经典位操作。我们通过 2 次方分圆环将分析扩展到 Falcon、Hawk 和 NTRU。这意味着具有所有标准化参数集的 ML-KEM、Falcon、Hawk、NTRU-HPS 和 NTRU-HRSS 在量子攻击下都会被破坏。

title: Emergent supersymmetry in a time-space inverted quantum mechanics
abstract: This Letter shows that a supersymmetric structure is inherent to the time space inverted (TSI) quantum mechanics (QM) framework, where the spatial evolution of states is generated by the operator $\hat{\mathcal{P}}^{\pm}(\hat{\mathcal{H}},\hat t;q)=\pm\sqrt{2m[\hat{\mathcal{H}}-\mathcal{\hat V}(q)]}$ [\href{ this https URL }{Phys. Rev. A. {\bf 95}, 032133 (2017)}], named here Momentunian, whose square-root structure that can be factorized. Such factorization leads directly to a supersymmetric algebra with supercharges and partner Hamiltonians. For the relativistic Momentunian the zero mode states are shown to be evanescent states, \textit{independent} of the physical potential. Furthermore, the existence of non-relativistic and relativistic Momentunian \textit{partners} is demonstrated, whose zero-mode states are no longer necessarily zero energies, but vanishing momenta states. The natural emergence of the $1/2$-fractional time derivatives in the TSI QM, leads to supercharges which incorporate memory effects into the supersymmetric wave functions. Results indicate that supersymmetry emerges as a structural property of the TSI QM rather than being imposed phenomenologically.
summary: 这封信表明，超对称结构是时空倒置（TSI）量子力学（QM）框架所固有的，其中状态的空间演化由算子 $\hat{\mathcal{P}}^{\pm}(\hat{\mathcal{H}},\hat t;q)=\pm\sqrt{2m[\hat{\mathcal{H}}-\mathcal{\hat 生成V}(q)]}$ [\href{ 此 https URL }{Phys. Rev. A. {\bf 95}, 032133 (2017)}]，这里命名为 Momentunian，其平方根结构可以因式分解。这种因式分解直接导致具有增压和伙伴哈密顿量的超对称代数。对于相对论动量，零模态被证明是渐逝态，\textit{独立于物理势。此外，证明了非相对论和相对论动量\textit{partners}的存在，其零模态不再一定是零能量，而是动量消失态。 TSI QM 中 1/2$ 分数时间导数的自然出现导致了将记忆效应纳入超对称波函数的增压。结果表明，超对称性是作为 TSI QM 的结构属性出现的，而不是现象学强加的。

title: From Fundamental Dynamics to Applied Cryptography: Studies on the Quantum Speed Limit and Fully Passive Quantum Key Distribution
abstract: This thesis studies two distinct frontiers of quantum information processing: the fundamental physical limits of dynamical evolution and the practical realization of secure quantum communication networks.
summary: 本论文研究了量子信息处理的两个不同前沿：动态演化的基本物理极限和安全量子通信网络的实际实现。

title: All Quantum Probability viewed in Complex Projective Geometry
abstract: In a recent paper it was shown that all the Hilbert space formulas for quantum probabilities can be realized as functions of geometric properties of the associated projective space, but those functions were expressed using the structures of the associated Hilbert space. In this paper a direct description of all these probabilities is given as formulas involving only the geometric properties of the projective space itself without referring to the associated Hilbert space theory. In large part this depends on a projection theorem for complex projective space which is analogous to the projection theorem for Hilbert spaces. The importance of this is that this exhibits quantum probability in terms of the geometry of a Riemannian metric in a non-linear Kähler manifold without any reference to a linear Hilbert space. As such this is a part of a larger program of the geometrization of physics. This opens the possibility of generalizations of quantum theory in other similar geometric settings. The theory presented includes projective spaces of both finite and infinite dimension. Some comments explain how quantum theory based on a von Neumann algebra is compatible with this approach.
summary: 最近的一篇论文表明，量子概率的所有希尔伯特空间公式都可以实现为相关射影空间的几何性质的函数，但这些函数是使用相关希尔伯特空间的结构来表达的。在本文中，所有这些概率的直接描述都以仅涉及射影空间本身的几何性质的公式给出，而没有参考相关的希尔伯特空间理论。在很大程度上，这取决于复射影空间的投影定理，该定理类似于希尔伯特空间的投影定理。其重要性在于，它以非线性卡勒流形中黎曼度量的几何形式展示了量子概率，而无需参考线性希尔伯特空间。因此，这是物理学几何化更大计划的一部分。这开启了量子理论在其他类似几何设置中推广的可能性。提出的理论包括有限维和无限维的射影空间。一些评论解释了基于冯诺依曼代数的量子理论如何与这种方法兼容。

title: Where the Quantum Lives in D-Wave Hybrid Portfolio Optimization
abstract: We audit how much of D-Wave's hybrid quantum-classical portfolio-optimization service is actually quantum. On cardinality-constrained mean-variance-turnover instances spanning N equal to 10 to 640 with a Gurobi MIQP optimality anchor, the constraint-native LeapHybridCQM service matches Gurobi's proven optimum on all 54 instances where Gurobi proves optimality, but the mean QPU access time is only 0.034 seconds out of a 5-second wall-clock budget, roughly 0.7 percent of the run. The remaining roughly 99 percent is the service's classical decomposition, sub-problem assembly, and feasibility-aware reassembly, so the reported D-Wave hybrid win on this problem class is a constraint-native classical pipeline with a small QPU contribution rather than a quantum-sampling win. Two structural results sharpen this audit. First, the cardinality penalty contributes a dense rank-one term that makes the penalty-encoded logical graph fully connected regardless of the original covariance density, collapsing the intended density benchmark axis for all penalty-encoded paths while leaving the constraint-native sparsity intact. Second, the constraint-native service returns identical solutions at every tested wall-clock budget from 5 to 300 seconds and across 10 repeated calls, a determinism property of the service on this problem class. Together with two classical baselines, namely Gurobi MIQP and simulated annealing, and a comparison against the penalty-encoded hybrid interface, these results extend the prior constraint-native versus penalty-encoded observation of Sakuler et al. from the statement that the constraint-native interface handles constraints natively to the operational decomposition of where the win actually originates, a finding that reframes how D-Wave hybrid performance should be reported in quantum-finance benchmarks.
summary:
我们审核了 D-Wave 的混合量子经典组合优化服务中有多少实际上是量子的。在使用 Gurobi MIQP 最优性锚点跨越 N 等于 10 到 640 的基数约束均值方差周转实例上，约束本机 LeapHybridCQM 服务与 Gurobi 在所有 54 个实例上证明的最优性相匹配，其中 Gurobi 证明了最优性，但平均 QPU 访问时间仅为 5 秒挂钟预算中的 0.034 秒，大约为运行的 0.7%。剩下的大约 99% 是服务的经典分解、子问题组装和可行性感知重组，因此报告的 D-Wave 混合在该问题类别上的胜利是一个约束原生经典管道，具有较小的 QPU 贡献，而不是量子采样胜利。两个结构性结果使这次审计更加尖锐。首先，基数惩罚提供了一个密集的秩一项，使得惩罚编码的逻辑图完全连接，而不管原始协方差密度如何，从而折叠所有惩罚编码路径的预期密度基准轴，同时保持约束原生稀疏性完整。

其次，约束本机服务在 5 到 300 秒的每个测试挂钟预算下以及 10 次重复调用中返回相同的解决方案，这是服务在该问题类上的确定性属性。与两个经典基线（即 Gurobi MIQP 和模拟退火）以及与惩罚编码混合接口的比较一起，这些结果扩展了 Sakuler 等人先前的约束本机与惩罚编码观察。从约束原生接口处理原生约束到胜利实际起源的操作分解的说法来看，这一发现重新定义了在量子金融基准测试中应如何报告 D-Wave 混合性能。

title: Quantum Expectation Identities for the Three-State Model of a Molecular Domain
abstract: The electronic distribution of a molecular domain is examined in this study. A theoretical formulation of quantum molecular properties is presented using the Quantum Expectation Identity theorem (QEI), with a focus on the three-state model of the density matrix for the quantum state of a molecular domain as an open system. The report examines the relationship between ab initio statistical fluctuation-correlation theorems for quantum observables and their derivatives. We focus on three main quantities of a domain: the electronic population, its chemical potential, and its maximum capacity for accepting or donating charge with the neighbors. The analytical expressions for the quantities are presented and discussed in detail. At the end, we explore the concept of quantum purity and its proper application in the molecular domain.
summary: 本研究检查了分子域的电子分布。使用量子期望恒等定理 (QEI) 提出了量子分子特性的理论公式，重点关注开放系统分子域量子态的密度矩阵三态模型。该报告研究了量子可观测量的从头算统计涨落相关定理及其导数之间的关系。我们关注域的三个主要量：电子数量、化学势以及与邻居接受或提供电荷的最大能力。给出并详细讨论了这些量的解析表达式。最后，我们探讨了量子纯度的概念及其在分子领域的正确应用。

title: LEAD: A Local Ensemble-Assisted Parallel Decoding Framework for Quantum Tanner Codes
abstract: Quantum Tanner codes are a recently developed family of quantum error-correcting codes characterized by favorable asymptotic performance characteristics. Despite their theoretical potential, practical decoding algorithms that effectively leverage their structural properties remain limited. This work introduces LEAD (Local Ensemble-Assisted Decoder), a structure-aware decoding framework tailored for quantum Tanner codes. The proposed scheme leverages the decomposable structure of Cayley complexes to project the global code onto overlapping local subcodes defined by vertex neighborhoods, where error probabilities are estimated in parallel. To ensure global consistency, LEAD utilizes the inherent topological symmetry of the complex and introduces a soft-information regularization mechanism to mitigate local overconfidence during information aggregation. This framework enables highly parallelized, low-complexity decoding that is intrinsically compatible with various local search heuristics. Simulation results demonstrate that LEAD achieves significantly lower logical error rates than standard decoding framework while substantially reducing the average decoding latency and iteration count.
summary:
量子坦纳码是最近开发的量子纠错码系列，具有良好的渐近性能特征。尽管它们在理论上具有潜力，但有效利用其结构特性的实用解码算法仍然有限。这项工作引入了 LEAD（本地集成辅助解码器），这是一种为量子 Tanner 码量身定制的结构感知解码框架。所提出的方案利用凯莱复合体的可分解结构将全局代码投影到由顶点邻域定义的重叠局部子代码上，其中并行估计错误概率。为了确保全局一致性，LEAD利用复杂体固有的拓扑对称性，并引入软信息正则化机制来减轻信息聚合过程中的局部过度自信。该框架可实现高度并行、低复杂度的解码，本质上与各种本地搜索启发法兼容。

仿真结果表明，LEAD 的逻辑错误率显着低于标准解码框架，同时显着降低了平均解码延迟和迭代次数。

title: Heralded Generation of Multipartite Free-Electron W-State Entanglement
abstract: We propose a heralded protocol for generating multipartite free-electron entanglement from atomic $W_N$ resources in a sideband-resolved interaction regime. The scheme consists of $N$ independent electron--atom interaction arms, where each free electron couples locally to one two-level system. For uniform couplings and common detuning, the dynamics is solved analytically within the rotating-wave approximation. Projecting the atoms onto the all-ground state maps the initial atomic excitation manifold onto the electronic upper-sideband manifold and prepares an exact $N$-electron $W_N$-type state. The heralding probability is obtained in closed form for resonant and detuned regimes. At resonance, the optimal success probability obeys the large-$N$ scaling $P_{G_N}^{\max}\sim e^{-1}/N$. The heralded state retains the multipartite entanglement structure of the atomic resource, as shown for arbitrary $N$ and illustrated explicitly for $N=3$. Detuning, weak symmetry breaking, beyond-rotating-wave corrections, and Gaussian coupling envelopes are discussed. The protocol provides a scalable route toward multipartite free-electron entanglement generation from localized atomic resources within quantum electron optics.
summary:
我们提出了一种在边带解析交互机制中从原子 $W_N$ 资源生成多方自由电子纠缠的协议。该方案由 $N$ 个独立的电子-原子相互作用臂组成，其中每个自由电子局部耦合到一个两能级系统。对于均匀耦合和常见失谐，可以在旋转波近似中解析求解动力学。将原子投影到全基态上，将初始原子激发流形映射到电子上边带流形上，并准备精确的 $N$ 电子 $W_N$ 型状态。对于谐振和失谐状态，预示概率以封闭形式获得。在共振时，最佳成功概率遵循大$N$缩放$P_{G_N}^{\max}\sim e^{-1}/N$。预示的状态保留了原子资源的多部分纠缠结构，如任意 $N$ 所示，并针对 $N=3$ 明确说明。讨论了失谐、弱对称破缺、超旋转波校正和高斯耦合包络。

该协议提供了一种可扩展的途径，从量子电子光学内的局部原子资源生成多部分自由电子纠缠。

title: Bound state in the continuum and dynamics via phase modulation in giant-atom waveguide setups
abstract: Giant atoms, which couple to a waveguide through multiple spatially separated connection points beyond the dipole approximation, provide a versatile route for quantum information processing based on interference-induced bound states in the continuum (BICs). While multi-giant-atom architectures are being developed toward giant-atom quantum networks, the role of direct coupling between the giant atoms, in particular the associated coupling phase, in atomic dynamics remains insufficiently understood. Here we take a first step toward addressing this issue by studying a two-giant-atom waveguide-QED model. We show that the coupling phase can be used to control both the number of BICs and their profiles for both of photon and atoms. More interestingly, the presence of BICs gives rise to a variety of dynamical behaviors, providing an effective mechanism for tailoring quantum-state evolution in giant-atom waveguide-QED systems. Our results highlight coupling-phase engineering as a useful tool for controlling interference, bound states, and quantum dynamics in nonlocal light--matter interfaces.
summary: 巨型原子通过偶极近似之外的多个空间分离的连接点耦合到波导，为基于连续体中干扰引起的束缚态（BIC）的量子信息处理提供了一种通用途径。虽然多巨原子架构正在朝着巨原子量子网络的方向发展，但巨原子之间的直接耦合，特别是相关的耦合相，在原子动力学中的作用仍然没有得到充分的理解。在这里，我们通过研究双巨原子波导 QED 模型，迈出了解决这个问题的第一步。我们证明耦合相可用于控制 BIC 的数量及其光子和原子的分布。更有趣的是，BIC 的存在引起了各种动力学行为，为定制巨原子波导 QED 系统中的量子态演化提供了有效的机制。我们的结果强调耦合相工程是控制非局域光-物质界面中的干扰、束缚态和量子动力学的有用工具。

title: Geometric Prototype Learning in Quantum Hilbert Space with Matrix Product States
abstract: Quantum probability provides a novel framework for formulating machine-learning (ML) problems in Hilbert space. We introduce a prototype-based learning scheme where class representatives are encoded as generative matrix product states (MPS). Because these prototypes reside in the same Hilbert space as quantum-encoded data samples, various ML tasks such as classification and clustering can be performed through geometric measures of quantum states. This approach lifts prototype learning from classical feature space to quantum Hilbert space. Benchmarks on Fashion-MNIST and a real-world electrocardiogram dataset demonstrate that our method outperforms classical prototype approaches while remaining competitive with standard black-box neural networks. We also identify an ``attraction'' effect induced by the quantum-probabilistic prototypes and introduce a dimensionality-reduction scheme based on prototype distances. Our results establish quantum states as an explainable framework for prototype learning, opening new directions for designing ML algorithms in quantum Hilbert space.
summary: 量子概率为在希尔伯特空间中表述机器学习 (ML) 问题提供了一种新颖的框架。我们引入了一种基于原型的学习方案，其中类代表被编码为生成矩阵乘积状态（MPS）。由于这些原型与量子编码数据样本位于同一希尔伯特空间中，因此可以通过量子态的几何测量来执行分类和聚类等各种机器学习任务。这种方法将原型学习从经典特征空间提升到量子希尔伯特空间。 Fashion-MNIST 和真实世界心电图数据集的基准表明，我们的方法优于经典原型方法，同时与标准黑盒神经网络保持竞争力。我们还识别了由量子概率原型引起的“吸引力”效应，并引入了基于原型距离的降维方案。我们的结果将量子态确立为原型学习的可解释框架，为在量子希尔伯特空间中设计机器学习算法开辟了新方向。

title: Probing Tensor Singularities and Their Euler-Class Descendants via Non-Abelian Quantum Geometry Measurement
abstract: We report the theoretical prediction and experimental observation of a new class of four-dimensional (4D) tensor singularities and their three-dimensional (3D) Euler-class descendants, protected by chiral and spacetime inversion symmetries on a superconducting circuit platform. The 4D point-like singularity/monopole, characterized by the Dixmier-Douady class of a real bundle gerbe associated with tensor gauge fields, is observed to evolve into a nodal ring carrying an additional first Euler class charge under symmetry-preserving perturbations. Dimensional reduction reveals 3D Euler and Euler curvature dipoles, exhibiting nontrivial Euler topology and a topological sum rule that ensures zero-energy flat bands inherit nontrivial topology even without interactions. Crucially, these high-dimensional degenerate systems are mapped and reconstructed using a hybrid analog-digital protocol designed for non-Abelian quantum geometry measurement within a superconducting qubit array. Our work not only expands the family of topological monopoles but also establishes a robust experimental framework for exploring high-order gauge theory and real-bundle topology across diverse quantum platforms.
summary: 我们报告了一类新的四维（4D）张量奇点及其三维（3D）欧拉级后代的理论预测和实验观察，它们在超导电路平台上受到手性和时空反演对称性的保护。 4D 点状奇点/单极子，其特征是与张量规范场相关的实束 gerbe 的 Dixmier-Douady 类，观察到在保对称扰动下演变成携带附加第一欧拉类电荷的节环。降维揭示了 3D 欧拉和欧拉曲率偶极子，展示了非平凡的欧拉拓扑和拓扑和规则，确保零能量平带即使在没有相互作用的情况下也继承非平凡的拓扑。至关重要的是，这些高维简并系统使用混合模拟数字协议进行映射和重建，该协议专为超导量子位阵列内的非阿贝尔量子几何测量而设计。我们的工作不仅扩展了拓扑单极子家族，还建立了一个强大的实验框架，用于跨不同量子平台探索高阶规范理论和实丛拓扑。

title: Quantum Sidecar Architectures for Hybrid AI Training and Inference: Stateful Protected Registers, Stateless Reset-and-Reprepare Circuits and Quantum Weight-State Outlook
abstract: We propose a quantum sidecar architecture family for future hybrid AI training and inference. The central idea is not to store an entire Transformer in a small quantum memory, nor to claim one-shot collapse into a fully trained model or an optimal answer. Instead, we identify two physically distinct operating modes for quantum co-processors attached to classical large-model pipelines. The first is a stateful protected-register mode, in which a protected register stores a reusable quantum resource while an ancilla or temporary register performs QND-style readout. The second is a stateless reset-and-reprepare mode, in which each query prepares a task-conditioned quantum circuit, evolves over bounded training or inference control variables, measures candidate signals, resets the qubits, and repeats. We simulate the stateful mode using 2/4/6/8 protected-qubit density-matrix QND-style parity readout with one ancilla and a Qiskit cross-check. For the stateless mode, we include both an abstract candidate-update sampler and a circuit-level QAOA-style statevector sampler over structured candidate landscapes, followed by reset-overhead sensitivity analysis. The resulting framework positions quantum sidecars as bounded signal generators for optimizer-side sampling, adapter or expert selection, retrieval, routing, and reasoning-path proposal. As a speculative outlook, we introduce quantum weight-state sidecars: restricted quantum representations over model-control variables, not direct encodings of complete classical weight tensors.
summary:
我们提出了一个量子边车架构系列，用于未来的混合人工智能训练和推理。中心思想不是将整个 Transformer 存储在小型量子存储器中，也不是声称一次性崩溃为经过充分训练的模型或最佳答案。相反，我们为连接到经典大模型管道的量子协处理器确定了两种物理上不同的操作模式。第一种是有状态的受保护寄存器模式，其中受保护寄存器存储可重用的量子资源，而辅助寄存器或临时寄存器执行 QND 式读出。第二种是无状态重置和重新准备模式，其中每个查询准备一个任务条件量子电路，在有界训练或推理控制变量上演进，测量候选信号，重置量子位并重复。我们使用 2/4/6/8 受保护量子位密度矩阵 QND 式奇偶校验读出器以及一个辅助设备和 Qiskit 交叉检查来模拟有状态模式。对于无状态模式，我们在结构化候选景观上包括抽象候选更新采样器和电路级 QAOA 式状态向量采样器，然后进行重置开销敏感性分析。

由此产生的框架将量子边车定位为有界信号生成器，用于优化器端采样、适配器或专家选择、检索、路由和推理路径建议。作为一种推测性的展望，我们引入了量子权重状态边车：模型控制变量的受限量子表示，而不是完整经典权重张量的直接编码。

title: Structural $f$-divergence: Tight universal bounds for cost function moments and gradients in parameterized quantum circuits
abstract: The barren plateau phenomenon, in which cost-function gradients of variational quantum algorithms vanish exponentially, remains a central obstacle for near-term quantum computing. Existing analyses typically depend on t-design or Haar-random assumptions and bound quantities at the level of unitary distributions, offering limited insight for designing probability measures on the parameter space of parameterized quantum circuits. In this paper, we introduce the structural $f$-divergence, a symmetric $f$-divergence-based measure between probability distributions on the parameter space. We establish analytically trade-off inequalities that bound the discrepancies in the expected gradient magnitude and in the cost-function moments between a distribution on PQC and a reference distribution; equality is attained by a minimal one-qubit, one-layer ansatz. As applications, we derive necessary conditions on probability measures for avoiding BPs and cost concentration, and sufficient conditions that suppress noise-induced deviations.
summary: 贫瘠的高原现象（变分量子算法的成本函数梯度呈指数消失）仍然是近期量子计算的主要障碍。现有的分析通常依赖于 t 设计或 Haar 随机假设以及酉分布级别的有界量，为设计参数化量子电路的参数空间的概率度量提供了有限的见解。在本文中，我们介绍了结构$f$散度，这是参数空间上概率分布之间基于对称$f$散度的度量。我们建立了分析权衡不等式，限制了 PQC 分布与参考分布之间预期梯度大小和成本函数矩的差异；平等是通过最小的单量子位、单层 ansatz 来实现的。作为应用，我们推导了避免 BP 和成本集中的概率度量的必要条件，以及抑制噪声引起的偏差的充分条件。

title: Quantum-Battery-Powered Geometric Landau-Zener Interferometry
abstract: Classical microwave drives are usually treated as ideal phase-coherent work sources for superconducting-qubit control. What if such a drive is replaced by a finite quantum battery. As a demanding benchmark, we consider echo-refocused geometric Landau--Zener interferometry powered by a single quantized bosonic mode. The qubit--battery dynamics are described by a Jaynes--Cummings Hamiltonian, while the echo pulse is retained as a qubit-only refocusing operation that cancels the dynamical phase. In the macroscopic coherent-state limit, the usual classical geometric interferometer is recovered. At finite mean photon number, however, the Jaynes--Cummings coupling generates photon-number-resolved avoided crossings with gaps $\Omega_n=2g\sqrt{n}$. The qubit-only echo redistributes amplitudes between neighboring excitation sectors, so the finite-battery protocol is not a single classical interferometer but a coherent sector-resolved quantum evolution. This produces contrast loss, interferogram distortions, and measurable battery back-action. We further show that reducing photon-number fluctuations alone is not sufficient: geometric control requires a first-order phase reference. Geometric Landau--Zener interferometry therefore provides a practical benchmark for certifying phase-coherent quantum-battery energy.
summary:
经典微波驱动器通常被视为超导量子位控制的理想相位相干功源。如果这样的驱动器被有限量子电池取代会怎样？作为一个要求严格的基准，我们考虑由单一量化玻色子模式驱动的回声重聚焦几何朗道齐纳干涉测量法。量子位-电池动力学由 Jaynes-Cummings 哈密顿量描述，而回波脉冲被保留为仅量子位的重新聚焦操作，从而取消动态阶段。在宏观相干态极限下，恢复了通常的经典几何干涉仪。然而，在有限的平均光子数下，Jaynes-Cummings 耦合会产生光子数解析的避免与间隙 $\Omega_n=2g\sqrt{n}$ 的交叉。仅量子位回波在相邻激发扇区之间重新分配振幅，因此有限电池协议不是单个经典干涉仪，而是相干扇区解析的量子演化。这会产生对比度损失、干涉图失真和可测量的电池反作用。我们进一步表明，仅减少光子数波动是不够的：几何控制需要一阶相位参考。

因此，几何朗道-齐纳干涉测量法为验证相位相干量子电池能量提供了实用的基准。

title: Phonon-bottlenecked spin relaxation of Er$^{3+}$:CaWO$_4$ at milliKelvin temperatures
abstract: We study spin-lattice relaxation times of electron spins in Er$^{3+}$:CaWO$_4$ at millikelvin temperature, detected via their coupling to a low-mode volume superconducting resonator. At large magnetic field supporting strong phonon-emission rates, we observe a noticeable increase in relaxation times with increasing spin-excitations, which exhibit a unique $[\tanh (\hbar \omega_0/k_\text{B} T)]^2$ temperature dependence. These observations are typical of a phonon-bottlenecked spin relaxation, and have implications for quantum technologies that exploit rare-earth spin ensembles as coherent resources.
summary: 我们研究了毫开温度下 Er$^{3+}$:CaWO$_4$ 中电子自旋的自旋晶格弛豫时间，通过它们与低模体积超导谐振器的耦合来检测。在支持强声子发射率的大磁场下，我们观察到随着自旋激发的增加，弛豫时间显着增加，这表现出独特的 $[\tanh (\hbar \omega_0/k_\text{B} T)]^2$ 温度依赖性。这些观察结果是典型的声子瓶颈自旋弛豫，并且对利用稀土自旋系综作为相干资源的量子技术具有影响。

title: An Entropy-Governed Speedup for Quantum Algorithms on Local Hamiltonians
abstract: Low-energy estimation and state preparation for general $k$-local Hamiltonians are fundamental challenges in quantum complexity theory. For constant relative accuracy, Buhrman et al. (PRL 2025) recently broke the natural Grover bound $O(2^{n/2})$, where $n$ denotes the number of qubits, for both problems. In this paper, for any sufficiently small parameter $d\ge 0$, we present an even faster quantum algorithm that outputs a quantum state with energy bounded by the minimum energy over all depth-$d$ states (i.e., states obtained by applying a depth-$d$ circuit to the all-zero state), together with an estimate of this energy. For the class of Hamiltonians with depth-$d$ ground states, our algorithm furthermore achieves exactly the same energy guarantees as Buhrman et al. Our results also provide insight into the distinction between strongly entangled states and those admitting efficient classical descriptions.
summary: 一般$k$局部哈密顿量的低能量估计和状态准备是量子复杂性理论中的基本挑战。为了保持恒定的相对精度，Buhrman 等人。 (PRL 2025) 最近打破了这两个问题的自然 Grover 界限 $O(2^{n/2})$，其中 $n$ 表示量子位的数量。在本文中，对于任何足够小的参数 $d\ge 0$，我们提出了一种更快的量子算法，该算法输出一个量子态，其能量由所有深度 $d$ 状态（即通过将深度 $d$ 电路应用于全零状态获得的状态）的最小能量限制，以及该能量的估计。对于具有深度 $d$ 基态的哈密顿量类，我们的算法还实现了与 Buhrman 等人完全相同的能量保证。我们的结果还提供了对强纠缠态和那些接受有效经典描述的态之间的区别的见解。

title: One pure steered state implies Einstein-Podolsky-Rosen steering
abstract: In this work, we show that a two-qubit entangled state admitting at least one pure steered state is Einstein-Podolsky-Rosen (EPR) steerable from Alice to Bob. Pure steered states signifies that the quantum steering ellipsoid of Bob is tangent to his Bloch sphere at least at a single point. Furthermore, we prove that for a two-qubit entangled state, Bob's quantum steering ellipsoid is tangent to his Bloch sphere at exactly $N$ points, for $N\in \{ 0,1,2,\infty\}$, if and only if Alice's quantum steering ellipsoid is tangent to her Bloch sphere at exactly $N$ points. For any two-qubit entangled state, therefore, if one party can steer the other to at least one pure state, the state is two-way EPR steerable. We also present several illuminating instances of two-qubit entangled states such that the EPR steering can be verified in terms of pure steered states. Our result addresses the Gisin theorem in a EPR steering scenario: at least a single pure steered state implies two-way steering.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们证明了允许至少一个纯转向态的两个量子位纠缠态是爱因斯坦-波多尔斯基-罗森（EPR）可从爱丽丝转向鲍勃的。纯转向态表示鲍勃的量子转向椭球体至少在一个点与他的布洛赫球体相切。此外，我们证明，对于两个量子位纠缠态，鲍勃的量子转向椭球体与布洛赫球体在 $N$ 点处相切，对于 $N\in \{ 0,1,2,\infty\}$，当且仅当爱丽丝的量子转向椭球体在 $N$ 点处与她的布洛赫球体相切。因此，对于任何两个量子位纠缠态，如果一方可以将另一方引导至至少一个纯态，则该状态是双向 EPR 可操纵的。我们还提出了两个量子位纠缠态的几个有启发性的实例，以便可以根据纯转向态来验证 EPR 转向。我们的结果解决了 EPR 转向场景中的 Gisin 定理：至少一个纯转向状态意味着双向转向。

title: Quantum--Fluid Correspondence for Systems of Nonrelativistic Spin-$\frac{1}{2}$ Particles
abstract: We show that a charged fluid endowed with an internal spin degree of freedom naturally satisfies the Pauli equation for a nonrelativistic spin-1/2 particle, and that a collection of n such interacting fluids can be reformulated as an Euler flow in 3n dimensions, thereby providing a natural representation of a system of n Pauli particles. These results provide a fluid-mechanical derivation of the Pauli equation and extend the Madelung, or quantum-hydrodynamic, picture to many-particle quantum systems. In particular, they imply that an n-qubit quantum computer can, at least in principle, be realized as a suitable combination of n fluids, or equivalently as a 3n-dimensional Euler flow.
summary: 我们证明，具有内部自旋自由度的带电流体自然满足非相对论自旋 1/2 粒子的泡利方程，并且 n 个此类相互作用流体的集合可以重新表示为 3n 维的欧拉流，从而提供 n 个泡利粒子系统的自然表示。这些结果提供了泡利方程的流体力学推导，并将马德隆（或量子流体动力学）图像扩展到多粒子量子系统。特别是，它们意味着 n 量子位量子计算机至少在原则上可以实现为 n 种流体的适当组合，或者等效地实现为 3n 维欧拉流。

title: QLIF-CAST: Quantum Leaky-Integrate-and-Fire for Time-Series Weather Forecasting
abstract: Accurate and efficient time-series forecasting remains a challenging problem for both classical and quantum neural architectures, particularly in multivariate environmental settings. This work adapts the Quantum Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (QLIF) spiking neural network for time-series regression tasks, specifically short-term multivariate weather forecasting. We extend QLIF beyond classification and demonstrate its applicability to continuous-valued prediction problems. The QLIF-CAST model encodes neuron excitation states as single-qubit quantum superpositions, driven by Rx rotation gates and T1 relaxation decay, and is embedded within a hybrid quantum-classical recurrent architecture. We conduct two distinct evaluations. First, a controlled comparison against a parameter-matched classical LIF baseline on a multivariate weather dataset shows that QLIF-CAST achieves 15.4% lower MSE and 4.4% lower MAE, demonstrating that quantum neuronal dynamics reduce prediction error over classical equivalents. Second, a cross-domain comparative analysis with state-of-the-art quantum LSTM (QLSTM) and quantum neural network (QNN) models on air quality and wind speed benchmarks reveals that QLIF-CAST converges in up to 94% less training time, occupying a distinct position in the speed-error trade-off space. Hardware verification on IBM Marrakesh (156-qubit QPU) confirms reliable circuit execution with only 1.2% average deviation from simulation.
summary:
对于经典和量子神经架构来说，准确有效的时间序列预测仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是在多变量环境设置中。这项工作采用量子泄漏积分与激发 (QLIF) 尖峰神经网络来执行时间序列回归任务，特别是短期多元天气预报。我们将 QLIF 扩展到分类之外，并证明其对连续值预测问题的适用性。 QLIF-CAST 模型将神经元激发态编码为单量子位量子叠加，由 Rx 旋转门和 T1 弛豫衰减驱动，并嵌入混合量子经典循环架构中。我们进行两项不同的评估。首先，在多变量天气数据集上与参数匹配的经典 LIF 基线进行的受控比较表明，QLIF-CAST 的 MSE 降低了 15.4%，MAE 降低了 4.4%，这表明量子神经元动力学比经典等效方法减少了预测误差。

其次，对空气质量和风速基准的最先进的量子 LSTM (QLSTM) 和量子神经网络 (QNN) 模型进行的跨领域比较分析表明，QLIF-CAST 的收敛时间减少了 94%，在速度与误差权衡空间中占据了独特的位置。 IBM Marrakesh（156 量子位 QPU）上的硬件验证确认了可靠的电路执行，与模拟的平均偏差仅为 1.2%。

title: Dissipation-assisted preparation of Floquet-Laughlin states in superconducting circuits
abstract: Fractional Chern insulators (FCIs) are lattice analogs of fractional quantum Hall systems, where the interplay of strong interactions with a frustrated tunnelling kinetics leads to the emergence of a gapped ground state with long-range entanglement and anyonic excitations. The highly correlated nature of such systems makes their adiabatic preparation challenging already beyond the minimal system size of two particles. Considering Floquet implementations of the bosonic Harper-Hofstadter-Hubbard model of few photons in superconducting circuits, we design protocols for the driven-dissipative stabilization of its FCI ground state at half filling via quantum bath engineering. Dissipation control is achieved through the coupling to driven leaky cavity modes, which realize a tuneable artificial environment having the Floquet-FCI as its approximate fixed point. For systems of two, three and six particles, we show numerically how the flexibility of the control scheme further allows for the detection of fractional quantum Hall signatures in the stabilized steady states, including bulk incompressibility, Hall response and the trapping of fractional charges. Our results provide a concrete pathway to dissipation-assisted preparation of strongly correlated states in quantum simulators.
summary:
分数陈绝缘体（FCI）是分数量子霍尔系统的晶格类似物，其中强相互作用与受挫隧道动力学的相互作用导致出现具有长程纠缠和任意子激发的带隙基态。这种系统的高度相关性使得它们的绝热制备具有挑战性，已经超出了两个粒子的最小系统尺寸。考虑到超导电路中少数光子的玻色 Harper-Hofstadter-Hubbard 模型的 Floquet 实现，我们设计了通过量子浴工程在半填充时实现 FCI 基态驱动耗散稳定的协议。耗散控制是通过与驱动漏腔模式的耦合来实现的，这实现了以 Floquet-FCI 作为其近似固定点的可调谐人工环境。对于两个、三个和六个粒子的系统，我们以数值方式展示了控制方案的灵活性如何进一步允许检测稳定稳态下的分数量子霍尔特征，包括体积不可压缩性、霍尔响应和分数电荷的捕获。

我们的结果为量子模拟器中强相关态的耗散辅助制备提供了一条具体途径。

title: Reduced-State Stabilizer Rényi Entropy as a Probe of Quantum Criticality in the Transverse ANNNI Model and the Quantum Compass Model
abstract: We investigate the effectiveness of the stabilizer Rényi entropy (SRE), a quantifier associated with non-stabilizer resources (quantum magic), as an indicator of quantum phase transitions. Specifically, we analyze the behavior of the purity-corrected SRE of reduced density matrices in the ground states of two one-dimensional spin models: the transverse axial next-nearest-neighbor Ising (TANNNI) model and the quantum compass model (QCM). The ground state of the TANNNI model is obtained using exact diagonalization techniques, while the QCM is analyzed using the Jordan--Wigner (JW) transformation followed by Bogoliubov diagonalization of the resulting quadratic fermionic Hamiltonian. For the TANNNI model, the purity-corrected SRE successfully detects the antiphase--floating phase transition in the high-frustration regime, while in the low-frustration regime the raw (purity-uncorrected) SRE reproduces the known ferromagnetic--paramagnetic phase boundaries more accurately. For the QCM, the purity-corrected SRE exhibits a clear signature near the isotropic point \(J_x/J_z=1\), where the system undergoes a first-order quantum phase transition. Our results establish SRE of reduced states as a complementary probe of quantum criticality and provide further insight into the role of non-stabilizer resources in many-body quantum phase transitions.
summary:
我们研究了稳定器 Rényi 熵 (SRE) 的有效性，它是与非稳定器资源（量子魔法）相关的量词，作为量子相变的指标。具体来说，我们分析了两个一维自旋模型基态下约化密度矩阵的纯度校正 SRE 的行为：横轴次近邻伊辛 (TANNNI) 模型和量子罗盘模型 (QCM)。 TANNNI 模型的基态是使用精确对角化技术获得的，而 QCM 则使用 Jordan--Wigner (JW) 变换进行分析，然后对所得二次费米子哈密顿量进行 Bogoliubov 对角化。对于 TANNNI 模型，纯度校正的 SRE 成功地检测了高失挫状态下的反相 - 浮动相变，而在低失挫状态下，原始（纯度未校正）SRE 更准确地再现了已知的铁磁 - 顺磁相边界。对于 QCM，纯度校正的 SRE 在各向同性点 \(J_x/J_z=1\) 附近表现出清晰的特征，系统在该点经历一阶量子相变。

我们的结果将还原态的 SRE 确立为量子临界性的补充探针，并进一步深入了解非稳定剂资源在多体量子相变中的作用。

title: Precision limits for time-dependent quantum metrology under Markovian noise
abstract: We derive ultimate precision bounds for estimating parameters encoded in \emph{time-dependent} Hamiltonians in the presence of general Markovian noise, allowing for arbitrary adaptive protocols with fast controls and noiseless ancillas. Extending the minimization-over-purifications framework to time-varying continuous channels, we obtain a differential upper bound on the achievable quantum Fisher information (QFI) that can be evaluated at all times via semidefinite programming. For parameter-independent noise, we prove a universal long-time scaling law: if the coherent (noiseless) dynamics yields $Q_{\mathrm{coh}}(T)\sim T^{2k}$, then under Markovian noise the QFI scales at most as $Q(T)\sim T^{2k}$ in the DHNLS regime, whereas in the DHLS regime it is fundamentally limited to $Q(T)\sim T^{2k-1}$. We illustrate these behaviors on paradigmatic driven-qubit sensors, exhibiting $T^{4}$ and $T^{3}$ scalings under dephasing and spontaneous emission, respectively. Finally, we provide explicit continuous exact and approximate quantum error correction constructions -- supplemented by spin-squeezed probes -- that asymptotically saturate the bounds, establishing their tightness.
summary: 我们得出了在存在一般马尔可夫噪声的情况下估计以\emph{时间相关}哈密顿量编码的参数的最终精度界限，从而允许具有快速控制和无噪声辅助的任意自适应协议。将最小化纯化框架扩展到时变连续通道，我们获得了可实现的量子费希尔信息（QFI）的微分上限，可以通过半定规划随时评估该上限。对于与参数无关的噪声，我们证明了一个通用的长期标度律：如果相干（无噪声）动力学产生 $Q_{\mathrm{coh}}(T)\sim T^{2k}$，那么在马尔可夫噪声下，QFI 在 DHNLS 体系中的标度最多为 $Q(T)\sim T^{2k}$，而在 DHLS 体系中，它基本上限于 $Q(T)\sim T^{2k-1}$。我们在范例驱动量子位传感器上说明了这些行为，分别在相移和自发发射下表现出 $T^{4}$ 和 $T^{3}$ 缩放。最后，我们提供了明确的连续精确和近似量子误差校正结构——辅以自旋压缩探针——渐近饱和边界，建立其紧密性。

title: Bounds on quantum conference key agreement in pair-entangled networks
abstract: We investigate the task of conference key agreement in near-term quantum networks, where the nodes are connected by sources of bipartite entangled states, under the class of local operations not requiring quantum memory. We derive upper bounds on the distillable conference key depending on the network topology and degree of entanglement of the sources, and prove tightness of these bounds for some particular cases. In these cases, we show that pairwise bipartite key distillation followed by merging the bipartite keys into the conference key is optimal.
summary: 我们研究了近期量子网络中会议关键协议的任务，其中节点通过二分纠缠态源连接，在不需要量子存储器的本地操作类别下。我们根据网络拓扑和源的纠缠程度得出可蒸馏会议密钥的上限，并在某些特定情况下证明这些界限的严格性。在这些情况下，我们表明，成对的二分密钥蒸馏，然后将二分密钥合并到会议密钥中是最佳的。

title: Geometrical derivation of Wigner's angle for arbitrary Lorentz transformations of massless particles
abstract: This note summarizes the physics and mathematics of Lorentz transformations for massless particles, specifically for photons. We provide a complete analytical derivation of Wigner's little group matrix and a closed formula for the calculation of Wigner's angle for arbitrary Lorentz transformations. Our derivation highlights the geometrical content of the sequence of little group transformations leading to Wigner's matrix and links it to classical theorems in spherical trigonometry.
summary: 本笔记总结了无质量粒子（特别是光子）洛伦兹变换的物理和数学知识。我们提供了维格纳小群矩阵的完整解析推导以及用于计算任意洛伦兹变换的维格纳角的封闭公式。我们的推导强调了导致维格纳矩阵的小群变换序列的几何内容，并将其与球面三角学中的经典定理联系起来。

title: A geometric Fano--Procrustes framework for purification-based distances and quantum channels analysis
abstract: In this work we reformulate the Uhlmann purification-overlap optimization and develop a purification-based geometric framework for the analysis of mixed qubit states and qubit channels. Using the Fano representation of two-qubit pure states, a purification is described in terms of the Bloch vector of the system, the ancilla Bloch vector, and a real correlation matrix. For a fixed one-qubit mixed state, the freedom in the choice of purification can be parametrized by proper rotations acting on the ancillary degrees of freedom. As a result, the optimization over purifications entering the definition of the metric \(D_N\) introduced in Ref.~\cite{Lamberti2009} is reduced to an orthogonal Procrustes problem on the Lie group \(SO(3)\). This reduction yields not only the maximal purification overlap, but also the optimal rotation relating the purification frames. From this rotation we define a purification misalignment angle \(\Theta\), which provides geometric information not contained in scalar fidelity-based distinguishability measures. The formalism is applied to representative qubit channels, including depolarizing, bit-flip, phase-flip, amplitude-damping channels, and an imperfect quantum NOT gate. For symmetry-adapted evolutions preserving the Bloch-vector direction, the optimal rotation is trivial and \(\Theta=0\), whereas noncollinear channel actions generate a nonzero misalignment. The pair \((D_N,\Theta)\) therefore separates the magnitude of the maximal purification overlap from the geometric reorientation of the optimal purification frames.
